remaining_plans.name: Push Reviews
remaining_plans.description: push webhook handler, review_units table, commit comments

remaining_plans.name: Backfill CLI
remaining_plans.description: git history replay with Gemini Flash, session grouping

completed_tasks.name: Live Gemini smoke test + thought_signature fix

steps: Set up .env with all keys (Anthropic, Gemini, Voyage, GitHub App)
Run npm install && npm run db:init
Update GitHub App webhook URL from smee.io to Funnel URL
deploy_needed.note: Currently running locally with smee proxy. Functional but not persistent.

human_actions_pending.context: Server runs locally on :3002 via smee. Needs Tailscale Funnel for production webhook URL.

human_actions_pending.action: Add push event to GitHub App
human_actions_pending.context: Plan 2 (Push Reviews) requires subscribing to push events in GitHub App settings

decisions.rationale: Same tools, same prompts, swappable LLM backend per stage
Three-tier token strategy: Claude brain, Gemini cloud grunt, local free grunt

decisions.decision: providerMetadata on ContentBlock for Gemini 3 thought_signature
decisions.rationale: Gemini 3 Flash Preview requires echoing thought_signature in multi-turn tool loops

decisions.decision: Push reviews as primary trigger for main-branch developers
decisions.rationale: Target users (YC/gstack builders) ship to main, not PRs. Push reviews = zero workflow change.

decisions.decision: review_units table generalizes PRs and pushes
decisions.rationale: pipeline_runs FK points to review_units, not pull_requests. Both PR and push map to review units.

decisions.decision: Backfill via git history session grouping
decisions.rationale: Group consecutive commits by author with <30min gaps into push sessions. Run pipeline with budget profile.

next_action: Three options: (1) Deploy to Mac Mini via /mac-mini, (2) Write Plan 2 implementation plan (Push Reviews), (3) Write Plan 3 implementation plan (Backfill CLI). Deploy is independent of Plans 2/3.
context_notes: All v1.0 phases (6 phases, 17 plans) plus Plan 1 of the v2 spec are complete. The pipeline now supports 4 providers with profile-based model selection. Gemini 3 Flash Preview verified working end-to-end (57s pipeline, 6 findings, PR comment posted). 239 tests passing across 23 test files. The spec for Plans 2+3 is written but implementation plans are not. The key product insight driving this work: best builders ship to main, not PRs. Push reviews + backfill = the product works for its actual users from day one.
